CET Exam Server Manager
Government Polytechnic College, Nanded, Maharashtra
MAR — MAY 2024
  • Administered and monitored secure server infrastructure for government CET examination sessions, maintaining 100% uptime and protecting sensitive candidate data.
  • Configured and enforced access control policies and user permissions for exam staff, significantly reducing unauthorized access risk to critical systems.
  • Performed real-time system monitoring and log analysis during live exam operations — detecting and resolving potential incidents before impact on continuity.
  • Collaborated with the technical team under time-sensitive exam conditions: zero downtime and zero data breaches across all sessions achieved.
  • Applied government-standard access controls and security best practices to safeguard confidentiality and integrity of all candidate records.
